title: Verde Listos
lyrics:
Verde listos! Verde listos!
Austin FC, we're ready to go!
Verde listos! Verde listos!
Q2 Stadium, let the green flag flow!
description: Austin FC's official motto chant — 'Green, Ready' — sung by supporters at Q2 Stadium.

title: Verde Till I Die
lyrics:
Verde till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Austin FC, till the day we die.
description: Terrace pledge of lifelong support for the Verde and Black.

title: We Are Austin
lyrics:
We are Austin, super Austin,
We are Austin, from the capital city!
description: Call-and-response chant celebrating Austin as Texas's capital.

title: Austin FC Ole Ole Ole
lyrics:
Ole, ole, ole ole! Ole, ole!
Austin FC, ole, ole!
description: Victory chant adapted from the universal Ole Ole Ole.

title: Verde Verde Verde
lyrics:
Verde, verde, verde!
Austin FC! Austin FC!
Verde, verde, verde!
description: Simple repetitive chant for the club's green identity.

title: Capital City Boys
lyrics:
We're the capital city boys, making all the noise,
Austin FC, Austin FC, we're the capital city boys!
description: Chant linking the club to Austin's status as capital of Texas.

title: ATX Till I Die
lyrics:
ATX till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Austin FC, till the day we die.
description: Variant terrace song using the city's ATX abbreviation.

title: Q2 Stadium Belongs to Us
lyrics:
Q2 Stadium belongs to us,
Q2 Stadium belongs to us,
Everywhere we go, the people want to know,
Who we are, so we tell them.
description: Home end chant asserting Q2 Stadium as Austin FC territory.

title: Listos Verdes
lyrics:
Listos verdes, listos verdes,
Austin FC on the march again!
description: Spanish-English hybrid chant using the club's green-ready identity.

title: Keep Austin Verde
lyrics:
Keep Austin verde, keep Austin verde,
Keep Austin verde, Austin FC!
description: Play on Austin's 'Keep Austin Weird' slogan adapted for the club.

title: Lone Star Greens
lyrics:
Lone Star greens, Lone Star greens,
Austin FC, the finest team you've seen!
description: Chant referencing Texas as the Lone Star State.

title: March to Q2
lyrics:
March to Q2, march to Q2,
Austin FC, we're marching through!
description: Pre-match march chant as supporters head to the stadium.

title: Austin FC Anthem
lyrics:
Austin FC, the capital's team,
Verde and black is all we need,
From the Hill Country to the coast,
Austin FC, we love you most!
description: Original-style fan anthem for the club.

title: La La La Austin FC
lyrics:
La la la la la, la la la la la,
La la la la la la la, Austin FC!
description: Simple la-la-la terrace chant used during matches.

title: Green and Black Army
lyrics:
Green and black army, green and black army,
Austin FC, the green and black army!
description: Terrace identity chant for the Verde and Black supporters.

title: Over Land and Sea and ATX
lyrics:
We all follow Austin FC, over land and sea and ATX,
We all follow Austin FC, on to victory!
description: Away-support chant adapted from English terrace traditions.

title: Verde on a Saturday
lyrics:
Verde on a Saturday, we're going out today,
For a game of football with the Austin FC!
description: Matchday terrace song for Saturday kickoffs.

title: Austin FC We Love You
lyrics:
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
And Q2 is our home!
description: Simple love song for the club and stadium.

title: Texas Soccer Town
lyrics:
Austin, Texas, soccer town,
Verde and black we're world renowned!
description: Chant positioning Austin as a growing American soccer city.

title: Section Verde
lyrics:
Section Verde, Section Verde,
Loudest section in the league!
description: Chant for the loudest supporter sections at Q2 Stadium.

title: Austin FC Allez Allez
lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Austin FC, super Austin FC,
Allez, allez, allez!
description: Adapted allez-allez chant popular across global soccer.

title: Verde Wave
lyrics:
Do the verde wave, do the verde wave,
Austin FC, Austin FC, do the verde wave!
description: Stadium participation chant encouraging the wave.

title: ATX FC On Tour
lyrics:
ATX FC on tour, ATX FC on tour,
Everywhere we go, people want to know,
Who we are, where we come from.
description: Away-day chant for travelling Austin FC supporters.

title: Green Flag High
lyrics:
Keep the green flag flying high, in the Texas sky,
Austin FC forever, till the day we die!
description: Terrace song about flying the club's green flag.

title: Sebastian Driussi Song
lyrics:
Seba, Seba, Seba Driussi,
Austin FC number ten, he's the best you'll ever see!
description: Player chant for Argentine forward Sebastian Driussi.

title: Driussi Is His Name
lyrics:
His name is Seba Driussi, he plays for Austin FC,
His name is Seba Driussi, he's better than Messi!
description: Humorous player tribute comparing Driussi to Lionel Messi.

title: Diego Fagundez Song
lyrics:
Diego, Diego Fagundez, running down the wing,
Diego, Diego Fagundez, Austin FC king!
description: Chant for longtime MLS winger Diego Fagundez.

title: Alex Ring Song
lyrics:
Alex Ring, Alex Ring, leading from the back,
Alex Ring, Alex Ring, captain of the pack!
description: Tribute to Danish captain and defender Alex Ring.

title: Rodrigo Bentancur Chant
lyrics:
Bentancur, Bentancur, running through the middle,
Bentancur, Bentancur, Austin FC's riddle!
description: Chant for Uruguayan midfielder Rodrigo Bentancur at Austin FC.

title: Nick Lima Song
lyrics:
Nick Lima, Nick Lima, overlapping down the right,
Nick Lima, Nick Lima, green and black delight!
description: Full-back tribute for Nick Lima.

title: Cascante in the Middle
lyrics:
Cascante in the middle, Cascante in the middle,
Running the show, running the show!
description: Chant for Costa Rican midfielder Diego Cascante.

title: Brad Stuver Song
lyrics:
Brad Stuver, Brad Stuver, standing tall in goal,
Brad Stuver, Brad Stuver, keeping a clean sheet whole!
description: Goalkeeper tribute for Brad Stuver.

title: Pochettino Chant
lyrics:
Pochettino, Pochettino, scoring for the green,
Pochettino, Pochettino, best we've ever seen!
description: Chant for Austin FC forward Brandon Pochettino.

title: Emiliano Rigoni Song
lyrics:
Rigoni, Rigoni, magic on the ball,
Rigoni, Rigoni, best of them all!
description: Player tribute for Argentine winger Emiliano Rigoni.

title: Verde Goal Celebration
lyrics:
Score a goal, verde celebration,
Austin FC all across the nation!
description: Post-goal terrace chant.

title: MLS Expansion Pride
lyrics:
Twenty twenty-one we arrived, Austin FC came alive,
MLS expansion, verde and black, we thrive!
description: Chant referencing Austin FC's 2021 MLS expansion debut.

title: First Match at Q2
lyrics:
First match at Q2, history was made,
Verde and black, a new parade!
description: Chant commemorating the inaugural match at Q2 Stadium.

title: Playoffs Verde
lyrics:
Playoffs verde, playoffs verde,
Austin FC marching on!
description: Playoff push chant for late-season matches.

title: Beat Houston
lyrics:
Beat Houston, beat Houston, beat Houston today,
Texas derby, verde all the way!
description: Texas derby chant against Houston Dynamo FC.

title: Beat FC Dallas
lyrics:
Beat Dallas, beat Dallas, beat Dallas today,
Copa Tejas on the line, verde all the way!
description: Copa Tejas rivalry chant against FC Dallas.

title: Copa Tejas Champions
lyrics:
Copa Tejas champions, Copa Tejas champions,
Austin FC, the best in Texas!
description: Chant celebrating the Copa Tejas in-state trophy.

title: Verde Night
lyrics:
Verde night, verde night, everything's alright,
Austin FC under the Q2 lights!
description: Evening kickoff atmosphere chant.

title: Jump Around Q2
lyrics:
Jump around! Jump around! Jump around!
Austin FC, Q2 Stadium, jump around!
description: Stadium hype chant inspired by jump-around traditions.

title: Verde Drums
lyrics:
Beat the drums, beat the drums, verde drums are here,
Austin FC supporters, loudest in the atmosphere!
description: Chant for the supporter drumming sections.

title: Austin FC Forever
lyrics:
Austin FC forever, whatever the weather,
Verde and black together, now and forever!
description: Closing terrace song affirming long-term loyalty.

title: Green Smoke Rise
lyrics:
Green smoke rise, green smoke rise,
Austin FC, open your eyes!
description: Tifo and smoke celebration chant.

title: Verde Away Days
lyrics:
Verde away days, verde away days,
Following Austin every mile!
description: Dedicated travelling supporters chant.

title: Listos for Glory
lyrics:
Listos for glory, listos for glory,
Austin FC writing history!
description: Ambitious terrace chant for silverware.

title: Hill Country to Q2
lyrics:
From the Hill Country to Q2,
Austin FC, we follow you!
description: Geographic chant referencing the Texas Hill Country around Austin.

title: Verde Heartbeat
lyrics:
Feel the verde heartbeat, feel the verde heartbeat,
Austin FC, can't be beat!
description: Rhythmic clapping chant in the stands.
